global.description: The ad features a light gray background with bold text and abstract shapes.
global.main_message: Promoting a financial service with a focus on clarity and ease of signup.

elements.label: light gray background
elements.description: A light gray background that fills the entire canvas, providing a neutral base for the other elements.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one rectangular, rendered in a simple outline style.

elements.label: additional shapes
elements.description: Another abstract shape, possibly a rectangle, also in outline style, positioned centrally.

elements.label: main message text
elements.description: Bold, black text stating 'Your money, clearer' with a smaller line below it that reads 'Fast signup, instant card'.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer Fast signup, instant card

elements.label: VaultRun logo
elements.description: The logo 'VaultRun' displayed in a bold font at the top left corner, likely in black.

elements.label: call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Watch now' in white on a dark background.

elements.label: sale badge
elements.description: A small, yellow badge at the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold black letters.
